name: Balfour Beatty PLC
description: An international infrastructure group that finances, develops, builds and maintains complex infrastructure. Revenue inc. JVs ~£9.6bn. Active share buyback programme (£151m pa).

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Revenue inc. JVs £9,595m in FY2023 (+7.4%). UK and US construction, Support Services, Infrastructure Investments. Government infrastructure spending supports order book.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Underlying PFO margin 2.4% in FY2023 (down from 3.1% in FY2022). Construction is inherently low-margin. Support Services higher at 8.0%. Infrastructure Investments disposal profits volatile.
assumptions.risks: Low construction margins, project execution risk, supply chain and labour cost inflation, Infrastructure Investments disposal profits non-recurring. FY2023 underlying PFO fell from £279m to £228m.
assumptions.catalyst: UK and US infrastructure investment pipelines, support services contract wins, infrastructure concession disposals, aggressive buyback (shares 612m→558m, £151m pa), progressive dividend.
